title: Automation credits
excerpt: We are currently setting up and automating the work environment for a client. In this process, we utilize various automations, which affects their available credits. Is there a way to reset the counter for these automati…

posts.author: JanSalesStudio (Jan)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently setting up and automating the work environment for a client. In this process, we utilize various automations, which affects their available credits. Is there a way to reset the counter for these automations back to 0? We would like to know if this can be done through the ‘Granted Features’ tab in Salesforce for the specific client.

I hope anyone has an idea, thankyou in advance!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Each account has an automations and integrations actions limit, that resets monthly.
